mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE category_tree AS ( SELECT id, father_id FROM question_category WHERE id = #{categoryId} AND del_flag = '0' UNION ALL SELECT c.id, c.father_id FROM question_category c INNER JOIN category_tree ct ON c.father_id = ct.id WHERE c.del_flag = '0' ) SELECT id FROM category_tree

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT q.id) FROM question q WHERE q.question_category_id IN ( WITH RECURSIVE category_tree AS ( SELECT id, father_id FROM question_category WHERE id = #{categoryId} AND del_flag = '0' UNION ALL SELECT c.id, c.father_id FROM question_category c INNER JOIN category_tree ct ON c.father_id = ct.id WHERE c.del_flag = '0' ) SELECT id FROM category_tree ) AND q.del_flag = '0'
SELECT MAX(sort_num) FROM question_category WHERE father_id = #{fatherId} AND del_flag = '0'
SELECT id AS categoryId, father_id AS fatherId FROM question_category WHERE del_flag = '0'
